title: PPIP - Share data button presented after log out
scenario: After logging out, the "Share Data" toggle incorrectly reappears in app settings instead of remaining hidden as it should after Poly login.
steps: 1. Open the app and navigate to Settings.
3. Observe the 'Share Data' toggle in Settings.
5. Observe the 'Share Data' toggle in Settings again.
expected: After logging in with Poly credentials, the Share Data toggle should no longer be visible in Settings.
